title: Documentary Requirements for Verification, Authentication, or
content: 5 Attestation. The following documents shall be submitted to the MWO for verification, to 6 the Embassy/Consulate for authentication, or to the Department for attestation: 7 8 a. Special Power of Attorney (SPA) or any other equivalent document issued by the 9 principal or employer, specifically authorizing the licensed manning agency to 10 recruit for and in its behalf; 11 12 b. Manning Agreement containing among others, the responsibilities of both 13 principal/employer and manning agency with respect to the employment of 14 seafarers; 15 16 c. Valid Business License or Registration Certificate of the Principal/Employer 17 indicating the line of business or equivalent document or proof of existence of 18 business validated or certified by the issuing authority in the host country; and 19 20 d. Board Resolution or Secretary’s Certificate authorizing an official of the 21 principal/employer to sign the manning agreement and SPA on behalf of the 22 company. 23 24 The Department, in accordance with law and after consultation with the stakeholders, 25 may modify the list or prescribe additional documentary requirements. 26 27
